---
output: html_document
pagetitle: Josh Leon
---

<style type="text/css">
.main-container {
  max-width: 1800px;
  margin-left: auto;
  margin-right: auto;
}
</style>

<style>
div.brown { background-color:#a89d82; border-radius: 20px; padding: 20px;}
</style>
<div class = "brown">

<style>
div.grey { text-align:center; background-color:#333333; border-radius: 20px; padding: 20px;}
</style>
<div class = "grey">

# [Home](http://JLEON123.github.io) | [About Me](https://JLEON123.github.io/aboutme/index.html) | [Portfolio](http://JLEON123.github.io/portfolio/) | [CV](https://JLEON123.github.io/aboutme/CV.pdf/)

<div style= "float:right;position: relative;top:60px">
```{r, echo=FALSE}
knitr::include_graphics('./media/small_headshot.JPG')
```

<br><br><br><br><br><br><br><br><br>
<br><br><br>

</div>

___

<br>

<style>
div.white { color:#000000; text-align:left; background-color:#ffffff; border-radius: 15px; padding: 20px;}
</style>
<div class = "white">

## **Contact Info:**

### Josh Leon<br>
### Email: Joshuarleon0123@gmail.com<br>
### Phone: (385)-447-7934
<br><br><br>

</div>



```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)

library(tidyverse)
```
